dialogue.name: Lakshmi
pages: Filter coffee! Fresh filter coffee! Best in Cubbon Park!
I've been selling coffee here for fifteen years. Morning walkers love it!

active.name: Lakshmi
pages: Oh, Raju sent you? That old rascal thinks his coffee is best!
Here, try mine -- I use special Chikmagalur beans!

afterObjective.name: Lakshmi
pages: You already tried mine! Go tell Raju the verdict, haha!
